mapper.select: SELECT id, dimension_code, dimension_name, entity_code, attribute_code, dimension_type, physical_column, description, is_queryable, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_dimension WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT id, dimension_code, dimension_name, entity_code, attribute_code, dimension_type, physical_column, description, is_queryable, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_dimension WHERE dimension_code = #{dimensionCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, dimension_code, dimension_name, entity_code, attribute_code, dimension_type, physical_column, description, is_queryable, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_dimension WHERE is_deleted = false AND dimension_code IN #{code}
SELECT dimension_code FROM agent.dsl_dimension WHERE is_deleted = false AND embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vector}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, dimension_code, dimension_name, description FROM agent.dsl_dimension WHERE is_deleted = false AND embedding IS NULL
